reason: Target labels and permit history are the core supervised learning foundation.
caveat: Labels remain permit-record based and need continued QA for permit type/status semantics.
recommended_next_action: continue QA and preserve label versioning

reason: Parcel identity and base characteristics support stable joins and internal ranking context.
caveat: Current value context is not a historical assessment series unless dated snapshots are added.

reason: Historical zoning snapshots and map-change detections add time-aware land-use context.
caveat: Map changes are not official rezoning approval records without case dates.
recommended_next_action: request official rezoning case dates and decisions

reason: Road/rail accessibility and local transportation context improved current internal ranking research.
caveat: Transportation features are current-context unless historical road/project records are added.
recommended_next_action: request dated road network and project completion records

reason: STIP proximity and AADT context improved the transportation-enhanced research layer.
caveat: Current-context traffic/project context is not a historical time-safe feature set yet.
recommended_next_action: request historical AADT and dated project status records

reason: Phase 16C tax/value-only ablation produced the strongest internal PR-AUC and lift@top 5% variant.
caveat: Current tax/value enrichment should not be treated as historical value without dated snapshots.
recommended_next_action: keep for internal research and request historical value snapshots

reason: Plan-review records are useful planning context but hurt top-k ranking in ablation and need status semantics QA.
caveat: Current-context pipeline records may leak or add noise without temporal availability rules.
recommended_next_action: exclude from current best model and improve temporal/status mapping

reason: Concord-only plan context is useful for dashboard explanation but not countywide enough for the current best model.
caveat: Not a countywide future land use layer and current-context only.
recommended_next_action: exclude from current best model and request countywide future land use

reason: Proxy distance/service context is not true capacity and did not improve top-k ranking enough to include.
caveat: Should not be interpreted as water/sewer capacity or allocation.
recommended_next_action: exclude from current best model and request true utility capacity data

reason: FEMA flood overlays are strong due-diligence constraints and can support future model comparison.
caveat: Flood constraint is descriptive/regulatory context and not currently part of the current best internal ranking variant.
recommended_next_action: keep as planning context and evaluate in future governed model variants

reason: Attendance-zone assignment and presentation-derived utilization are useful due-diligence context.
caveat: Official school capacity/enrollment is missing and utilization seed requires verification.
recommended_next_action: keep out of model until official capacity/enrollment data passes QA

reason: Future land use is expected to be a high-value model input but is not countywide/time-versioned yet.
caveat: Do not substitute Concord-only or current-context plan data for countywide future land use.
recommended_next_action: request countywide adopted future land use with effective dates

reason: Official rezoning case dates and decisions are needed to distinguish map changes from approvals.
caveat: Do not treat zoning map-change detections as official rezoning approvals.
recommended_next_action: request rezoning case table with approval date old zoning and new zoning

reason: True water/sewer capacity and allocation would materially improve readiness modeling.
caveat: Current proxy features must not be treated as capacity.
recommended_next_action: request WSACC capacity allocation and service constraint data

reason: Official development approvals and subdivision pipeline data could improve near-term signal and governance.
caveat: Current plan-review context is not enough for production modeling.
recommended_next_action: request dated development pipeline approvals status and outcomes
